zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Moravia of Petty於1164年出生在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾度福斯時，他的父親William Murray of Sutherland26歲，母親Deolifard Oliphant22歲。他於1193年與Agnes Olifard在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾波維爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1226年10月5日在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾配第享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Moravia of Petty于1164年出生在苏格兰艾爾金爾度福斯时，他的父亲William Murray of Sutherland26岁，母亲Deolifard Oliphant22岁。他于1193年与Agnes Olifard在英国苏格兰藍納可爾波維爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1226年10月5日在苏格兰音巴內-爾配第享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Moravia of Petty was born in 1164, in Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland, his father, William Murray of Sutherland, was 26 and his mother, Deolifard Oliphant, was 22. He married Agnes Olifard in 1193, in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 5 October 1226, in Petty, Inverness-shire, Scotland, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Moravia of Petty est né en 1164, à Duffus, Elginshire, Écosse, son père, William Murray of Sutherland, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Deolifard Oliphant, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Olifard en 1193, à Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 5 octobre 1226, à Petty, Inverness-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Moravia of Petty 1164 in Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Murray of Sutherland 26 und seine Mutter Deolifard Oliphant 22. Er hat 1193 in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Agnes Olifard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 5. Oktober 1226 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Petty, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Moravia of Petty è nato il nel 1164 nel Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William Murray of Sutherland, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Deolifard Oliphant, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Olifard nel 1193, nel Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 5 ottobre 1226, nel Petty, Inverness-shire, Scotland, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Moravia of Pettyが1164年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアダフウスで生まれた時，父William Murray of Sutherlandは26歳，母Deolifard Oliphantは22歳であった。1193年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアボスウエルでAgnes Olifardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1226年10月5日にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアペッティで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Moravia of Petty(이)가 1164년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 더프스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Murray of Sutherland(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Deolifard Oliphant(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1193년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 벗웰에서 Agnes Olifard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1226년 10월 5일 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 페티에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Moravia of Petty nasceu em 1164, em Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Murray of Sutherland, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Deolifard Oliphant, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Olifard em 1193, em Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 5 de outubro de 1226, em Petty, Inverness-shire, Scotland, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Moravia of Petty родился в 1164 г. в местности дуффус, элгиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Murray of Sutherland было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Deolifard Oliphant, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Olifard в 1193 г. в местности ботвелл, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 5 октября 1226 г. в местности петти, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Moravia of Petty nació en 1164, en Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland, su papá, William Murray of Sutherland, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Deolifard Oliphant, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Agnes Olifard en 1193, en Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 5 de octubre de 1226, en Petty, Inverness-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 62 años.
